topbar.eyebrow: USB CDC · BLE GATT · 3P ASR · ESP32-S3

device.title: Device Bridge
device.connectHint: Connects via USB first, falls back to Bluetooth automatically.
device.bleNotAuthorized: BLE NOT AUTHORIZED — pair to allow wireless access.
device.pairingInstructions: On the board, hold the left + right keys together for ~3s until a 6-digit code appears. Then click Pair, compare the code, and confirm on the board (● middle key).
device.comparePairingCode: Compare with the board, then press ● on the board:
device.pairingCodeMatch: Does this code match the one on the board screen?
device.pairingConfirmHint: If they match, press the middle (●) key on the board to confirm, or the left (◀) key to cancel.

flash.title: Firmware Flash
flash.otaInProgress: ⚠️ OTA in progress — do NOT disconnect or perform other operations until complete.
flash.otaHint: OTA uses the current board connection. USB is fastest; BLE requires pairing and is slower.

voice.title: Voice
voice.thirdPartyHint: Companion records the selected mic, sends audio to the selected ASR provider, then pastes the transcript.
voice.systemHint: The board triggers macOS dictation via the Control double-tap (HID). The companion does not record in this mode.
voice.languageHint: Leave language empty by default. Volcengine documents this field as endpoint/mode dependent.
voice.keyMissing: KEY MISSING: paste X-Api-Key here before testing.
voice.testHint: Click Start and speak to test third-party ASR transcription.
voice.apiKeyError: Paste the Doubao provider X-Api-Key, then click Save Voice or Start again.

pairing.requesting: Requesting pairing… confirm on the board.
pairing.authRequired: Board requires pairing. Put the board in pairing mode and click Pair.
